label: Package A Parser/Protocol Smoke
limitations: Package A smoke only; not exhaustive fuzzing or differential testing.
Does not prove parser parity with Haskell cardano-node.
Does not establish finding, risk acceptance, or mitigation sufficiency.
No public Cardano network is contacted.
safety_notes: Runs selected Amaru parser/protocol, malformed-decode, handshake, mux, and mini-protocol message tests on the Linux target host.
PROPTEST_CASES is bounded to keep runtime suitable for iteration.
Evidence remains candidate-only and does not promote Package A risk rows.
